company_summary: Empyrean is a benefits administration technology company that provides employer-sponsored benefits management platforms, primarily serving mid-to-large enterprises. They focus on employee benefits enrollment, administration, and analytics, helping HR teams manage complex benefits programs. The company emphasizes data-driven insights and client success as core to their value proposition.
fit_indicators: Role title includes Analytics — Sudheer's experience building internal reporting and operational tooling at RNTBCI across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi aligns directly with analytics support for enterprise clients
Client Operations focus suggests cross-functional stakeholder work — Sudheer coordinated across engineering, design, and business teams at RNTBCI for internal tools used daily by operations staff

Benefits admin platforms are enterprise SaaS products — Sudheer's 4 years in enterprise Java systems gives him understanding of backend data flows and system integrations relevant to troubleshooting client-facing issues

MBA program context (Carlson STEM MBA) positions Sudheer as a business-technical bridge — Client Operations & Analytics intern roles typically require translating data insights into client-facing recommendations, matching his current trajectory toward Technical PM/AI Product

contact_targets.title: Client Operations Manager or Director
contact_targets.reason: Directly manages or oversees the team this intern would join — best person to speak to day-to-day work, team priorities, and what makes a strong candidate

contact_targets.title: Senior Analyst or Client Success Analyst
contact_targets.reason: Senior IC doing work similar to what the intern would do — can speak candidly about the analytics tools, client workflows, and growth path

contact_targets.title: MBA Recruiter or University Programs Recruiter
contact_targets.reason: If no operations contacts are reachable, a recruiter focused on MBA or intern programs can route the application and flag Sudheer's profile
